feed.title: SAP Community - Support Services
feed.subtitle: Support Services blog posts in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Premium Engagement Session 'Accelerate Business Transformation with AI' (May 16, 2024)
entry.content:
Virtual 

May 16, 2024

Agenda

Slides & Recording

00:01:46 Welcome & Introduction (Nina Schertiger) // 00:03:37 SAP Business AI – Overview (Reshat Furunzhiev) // 00:25:47 SAP Al Core / Generative AI (Alexander Bauer) // 00:53:35 Embedded Al Capabilities / Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management (Cedric Osornio) // 01:24:25 SAP MaxAttention Portfolio for AI (Reshat Furunzhiev) // 01:45:40 Open Discussion and Q&A with the Experts 

Dear Valued Customer,

The SAP Premium Engagement Session 'Accelerate Business Transformation with AI' took place virtually on May 16, 2024. Please find the agenda here.

The slides displayed during the session can be found here and the full recording can be found here.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

The health and well-being of our customers, employees, and business partners is a top priority for SAP. As a response to the restrictions regarding travel and physical events caused by COVID-19, we offer a virtual event format which allows you to have an interactive, digital experience in a safe environment.

Engage with us - Register for this workshop

In case you want to register for this workshop please reach out to maxattention@sap.com

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Como contatar o time de Suporte do Ariba para fornecedores?
entry.content:
Deseja entrar em contato com o suporte do fornecedor SAP Ariba? Você só precisa seguir os passos abaixo.

Como posso contatar o suporte do Ariba sem fazer login?

Se você não consegue fazer login, não se preocupe! Você ainda poderá acessar a Central de Ajuda do Ariba seguindo estas etapas:

  • Primeiro, acesse https://service.ariba.com/ e selecione a opção “Fornecedor”
  • Em seguida, clique no ponto de interrogação no canto superior direito da tela:
     

Uma nova coluna aparecerá no lado direito da tela. Você verá 2 opções:

  • Documentação: que redireciona você para o Portal de Ajuda do Ariba, onde você pode encontrar diretrizes e documentos de instruções
  • Suporte: para entrar em contato com a equipe de suporte do Ariba. Selecionaremos esta opção.

Após seguir esses passos, aparecerá uma nova aba na sua tela, o que significa que você acessou a Central de Ajuda do Ariba. Nesta página você pode pesquisar sobre suas dúvidas, revisar o conteúdo disponível e seguir respostas guiadas para encontrar as opções de suporte melhor se adaptam as suas necessidades.

Como solicitar uma ligação do time técnico?

Você só precisa ir até a aba “Fale Conosco”, onde poderá escolher entre 6 tópicos gerais, dependendo do problema que você está enfrentando:

  • Registre-se no Ariba Network
  • Resetar minha senha
  • Esqueci o nome de usuário
  • Cancelar inscrição
  • Solicitação de privacidade
  • Atualizar certificado de integração

Se nenhuma das opções acima corresponder ao seu problema, selecione a opção mais similar possível ao assunto desejado.

Após essa etapa, nosso sistema fará perguntas adicionais sobre o seu problema e, com base em suas respostas, links para documentações que podem ajudar, serão sugeridos.

Caso nenhuma documentação sugerida resolva o seu problema, você pode clicar em “Estou enfrentando um problema diferente” ou “Outra coisa” até chegar na opção “Criar um caso” no canto inferior direito.

Em seguida, você poderá solicitar contato através de uma chamada diretamente da equipe de suporte de Ariba para Fornecedores por meio de um formulário parecido com este:

Você somente precisará preencher o formulário, aceitar os termos e condições e escolher a opção “um último passo”

Dentro de alguns minutos, você receberá um e-mail de confirmação da solicitação e um membro da nossa equipe Ariba entrará em contato com você por telefone. Neste e-mail você receberá um número de caso, que será utilizado para acompanhamento de sua solicitação.

Como solicitar a ligação em outro idioma?

Como você pode ver na imagem acima, existe uma opção para alterar o idioma na parte superior do formulário. Aqui você pode selecionar seu idioma e o formulário de retorno de chamada será exibido nesse idioma.

Você também pode verificar as etapas descritas acima no vídeo Supplier Launchpad: Introducing the New Help Centre.

Caso seu problema esteja relacionado ao faturamento, recomendamos revisar o KB0404726 antes de solicitar suporte à equipe técnica.

Agradecemos sua leitura!

*Este conteúdo também está disponível em espanhol e inglês.

Esperamos que esse conteúdo tenha sido útil para você. Nossa equipe do Customer Interaction Center está disponível por chat, e-mail e telefone e teremos prazer em compartilhar mais orientações ou sanar suas dúvidas.

Para ler mais posts do CIC, clique aqui.

entry.title: Elevate Your Business with AI at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando!
entry.content:
Unleash the Power of Business AI

In an era where digital transformation is reshaping industries, Business AI stands at the forefront of innovation, driving efficiency, enhancing customer experiences, and unlocking new possibilities for businesses worldwide. SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando from June 3-5, 2024, offers a unique opportunity to explore the transformative potential of Business AI and connect with leading experts in the field.

Spotlight on Business AI: Don't Miss These Must-Attend Sessions!

  • Session 1: Translating Generative AI and LLMs into Business Benefits (SER207)
    Unlock the future of our customer support offerings by exploring how generative AI and large language models (LLMs) help engineers support customers with outstanding speed. Delve into the design, implementation, and integration of LLMs for enhanced internal efficiencies. Elevate your support capabilities for an accelerated customer experience.

  • Session 2: AI in Customer Support: SAP's Path to Excellence (ASUG307)
    Discover SAP's approach to support excellence by infusing AI into customer support, enhancing efficiency, and user satisfaction. Gain insights into actionable tactics for seamless AI integration and effective measurement of its business outcomes. Explore SAP's blueprint for top-tier AI-driven customer support.

  • Session 3: SAP runs SAP: Leading the AI Revolution in Customer Support (SER242)
    Experience our AI-driven customer support paradigm. Uncover strategies for AI fusion, elevating support efficacy, and customer satisfaction. Witness our journey, which sets benchmarks for AI-powered customer service excellence. Use this blueprint to smoothly integrate AI into your company, unlocking success through the SAP for Me portal.

  • Session 4: Reinventing Support with AI (SER202+SER247)
    Learn how our support offerings use intelligent automation and AI to elevate your customer experience. Gain insights into bi-directional support and witness our transformative journey toward delivering outstanding value. Step into the future of predictive, bi-directional support and maximize your support experience.

Experience Business AI in Action at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando!

Visit our demo station within the Services and Support Center on the show floor to see Business AI in action! Experience live demonstrations showcasing the power of AI in customer support, elevating efficiency, and user satisfaction. Uncover actionable strategies for effortlessly integrating AI into your operations and measuring its impact on business outcomes.

Exclusive Opportunity for 1:1 Meetings with Business AI Experts!

Don't miss the chance to engage directly with our Business AI experts during SAP Sapphire 2024! We're offering limited opportunities for 1:1 meetings at the Services and Support Center on the show floor in Orlando.

Limited Availability!
Take advantage of this unique opportunity to discuss your specific challenges and explore tailored solutions with our experts. Secure your 1:1 appointment now before slots fill up!

Request your meeting here: 👉I want to talk Business AI at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando

Get Ready to Elevate Your Business AI Strategy!

Join us at SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando to discover the power of Business AI and how it can transform your business operations. Engage with industry leaders, attend insightful sessions, and take the first step towards building a future-ready, efficient, and resilient business.

We look forward to seeing you there!

Feel free to share this article to promote the Business AI sessions at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando and encourage your network to arrange 1:1 meetings with our experts!

entry.title: Support Case vs Service Request – What's the difference?
entry.content:
Do you know the difference between a Support Case and a Service Request? If not, then you’re in the right place as I will explain those two options to get in touch with our technical experts according to your needs. 

What's the difference?

The Support Case is used to report technical/functional issues with an SAP product or SAP support application.  Getting support from an SAP Solution Expert via case is included in your maintenance offering. 

While the Service Request is based on the SAP Enterprise Cloud Services (ECS) contract with SAP; this service can be non-chargeable, subject to additional fees or chargeable. That can be used to make changes on cloud systems. 

Let’s start with the Support Case 

With the migration from the SAP One Support Launchpad to the SAP for Me, we have changed the terminology from “incident” to “case”. ‘Case’ is the new name for getting technical help in SAP for Me. 

To create a Case, you will need to access the Get Support Application via the Services and Support Dashboard. There you will see the card “Get Support”, this is the card that allows you to get access to the support application. 

Please review this Knowledge Base Article (KBA) that will provide you with the Best Practices for creating a support case: 1339209 Best practices for creating a support case - SAP for Me 

It is important to mention that you will need an S-user ID to create a case and that user must have the following authorizations: 

  • Display Cases 
  • Display all Cases 
  • Report a Technical Issue 
  • Send Cases to SAP 
  • Close Cases 

The authorizations will need to be assigned by the Super Administrator on your company or you can, use the self-service request (see KBA 2891528 How to use the Self-Service Authorization Request - SAP for Me). 

Perfect Case 

Here at SAP, we believe that this checklist will enable you to provide us with the elements of a perfect case. 

  • 1 problem per Case 
  • Document client analysis and SAP Note search  
  • Remote connection details 
  • A “meaningful” short text (error-related information) 
  • Detailed steps to reproduce the problem in your system. 
  • Appropriate priority, product area or component 
  • Business impact of problem on your operations  
  • Customer Contact Information   

More information on How to Create a Support Case can be reviewed on KBA 1296527 How to create a support case (contact SAP Product Support) - SAP for Me 

So, what about the Service Request? 

The Service Requests app offers the ability to request services for delivered systems, based on the SAP Enterprise Cloud Services (ECS) Roles and Responsibilities (R&R) document. The service request catalogue includes services categorized as: 

Standard services: non-chargeable and provided as part of the standard contract. 
Optional services: Subject to additional service fees and require a contractual change request. 
Chargeable services: 

  • Enhanced Managed Services (EMS): Supplemental set of services subject to additional fees for SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud (BYOL and Subscription) contracts, which could or could not be performed by customer. 
  • Additional Services: Supplemental set of services subject to additional fees for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, and SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud Advanced Edition contracts. 

- Templates with details on the service to be requested and specific input fields for the required parameters. 

- A continuously expanding service catalogue based on customer demand. 

How to access ECS Service Requests 

The following S-user ID authorizations are required to access the ECS Service Request application: 

  • Create Billable Service. 
  • Create Service Requests. 
  • Display Service Requests. 
  • Report a Technical Issue is needed to create or display service requests. 

Access the application via SAP for Me > ECS Workspace > Click Create Service Requests 

You will see a list of all open requests and the details of the selected request on the right side of the screen. 

To create a new Service Request, click New or New on Behalf which allows you to request services for a different user. 

Click Overview to view all services requests history. 

Further details can be found on KBA 2720477 How to access ECS Service Requests - SAP for Me 

How to use the Service Request Application 

To access and manage your Service Request, you can check KBA: 3239384 How to use Service Requests application - SAP for Me 

And here you can find some videos that explain the process:  

  • Creating a Service Request in SAP for Me 
  • Using a Service Request Application in SAP for Me 

You can also check this document that explains the use of Service Request: https://support.sap.com/content/dam/support/en_us/library/ssp/my-support/help-for-sap-support-applications/hec/ecs_service_requests.pdf  

Thank you for reading!  

We hope you found this helpful. Please note that the Customer Interaction Center is always happy to guide you on any of the mentioned processes and assist you with any queries you may have! 

You can contact CIC for assistance if you need any further guidance. The Customer Interaction Center can be contacted by Phone, Expert Chat and by email.

entry.title: Unlock the Future of Clean Core at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando!
entry.content:
The Clean Core Revolution

In today's rapidly evolving business landscape, maintaining a clean core has never been more crucial. A clean core strategy empowers organizations to streamline operations, enhance agility, and drive innovation by focusing on simplifying and optimizing core business processes. At SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando from June 3-5, 2024, we're diving deep into the transformative power of a clean core and how it can be a game-changer for your business.

Why You Can't Miss SAP Sapphire 2024

Get ready to embark on an inspiring journey of innovation and transformation at SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando from June 3-5, 2024! This premier event offers a unique opportunity to connect with industry experts, explore cutting-edge solutions, and gain insights into the latest trends shaping the future of business technology.

Spotlight on Clean Core: Don't Miss These Must-Attend Sessions!

  • Session 1: Enable a Clean Core with SAP Cloud ALM (SER253)
    Discover SAP's strategy for RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization, with a focus on SAP Cloud ALM as a platform for a clean core. Understand how to fortify your competitive edge by streamlining complexity, separating standard extensions, and managing data following the most recent standards. Uncover methods to preserve a reliable, adaptable infrastructure while retaining operational productivity and competence.

  • Session 2: Start Your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Journey Fresh with a Clean Core Strategy (SER258)
    Ready to start your SAP S/4HANA Cloud journey, be it greenfield or brownfield? Explore how embedded launch activities can support a clean-core strategy, guiding you through crucial initial steps. These activities, included in your subscription, optimize processes at no extra cost, supporting your cloud ERP transformation, regardless of approach.

Exclusive Opportunity for 1:1 Meetings with Clean Core Experts!

Don't miss the chance to engage directly with our Clean Core experts during SAP Sapphire 2024! We're offering limited opportunities for 1:1 meetings at the Services and Support Center on the show floor in Orlando.

Limited Availability!
Take advantage of this unique opportunity to discuss your specific challenges and explore tailored solutions with our experts. Secure your 1:1 appointment now before slots fill up!

Request your meeting here: 👉 I want to talk Clean Core at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando

Get Ready to Elevate Your Clean Core Strategy!

Join us at SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando to discover the power of a clean core and how it can transform your business operations. Engage with industry leaders, attend insightful sessions, and take the first step towards building a future-ready, efficient, and resilient business.

We look forward to seeing you there!

Feel free to share this article to promote the Clean Core sessions at SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando and encourage your network to arrange 1:1 meetings with our experts!

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention Summit 2024 Event Recap: MaXimize Transformation Success
entry.content:
How can SAP MaxAttention customers be supported on their individual business transformation journeys? This question set the tone for the SAP MaxAttention Summit 2024, which took place April 23-25 at the brand-new Heidelberg Congress Center in Germany. With 250 customer attendees and several SAP executives and experts on-site, this year’s summit was the largest ever, bringing a unique diversity of expertise and experience under one roof. Throughout the event, speakers and participants explored the key enablers for transformation success through a variety of formats. These included keynotes, executive sessions, customer experience sharing, a lively customer panel, and engaging eXpert eXchange sessions. The summit further provided many opportunities for peer-to-peer networking among C-level attendees and one-on-one meetings between customers and SAP executives.

It’s All About Accelerating Innovation Adoption

The SAP MaxAttention Summit 2024 kicked off on Tuesday evening with a welcome reception and warm opening words from the event hosts Thomas Saueressig (member of the SAP Executive board and head of the newly established board area ‘Customer Services & Delivery’) and Kurt Bauer (SVP and Global Head of Premium Engagements). The following morning, Kurt Bauer officially opened the first day of content with a thought-provoking question: “How does your roadmap towards an intelligent enterprise look like?” With this, he pointed out that every transformation journey has its own characteristics, and that the role of SAP MaxAttention therefore is to provide individual, strategic guidance for every customer. Thomas Saueressig picked up on this point in his subsequent keynote and shed light on SAP's approach to cloud solution delivery. The key to customer success, he said, is to help them accelerate the adoption of SAP innovations so they can fully leverage the value of SAP’s portfolio.

One of these innovations – and probably the most talked about during the event – is SAP Business AI. To showcase how customers can maximize the value of multiple capabilities, Philipp Herzig (Chief AI Officer at SAP) shared insights into SAP’s AI strategy and presented demos of current generative AI use cases. By investing in these use cases, customers can expect to not only reduce their workload, but also save a huge amount of money – a statement that was echoed by John Hill (CIO of Suncor Energy) who joined Philipp on stage to share insights into the value he is seeing from this innovation, especially in relation to invoice and account management.

But SAP Business AI isn’t the only enabler of a successful transformation journey. As it was shown in the following executive sessions that day, SAP cloud ERP solutions and a clear view of enterprise architecture and business optimization build the foundation for a future-ready IT strategy. On the one hand, Jan Gilg (President Cloud ERP) gave the SAP MaxAttention community a taste of the benefits of moving to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and explained how an SAP-managed cloud environment enables enterprises of all sizes and industries to adopt innovation faster and more flexibly, without losing control of global operations.

On the other hand, Gero Decker (Co-Founder and General Manager of SAP Signavio) and André Christ (Co-Founder and General Manager of SAP LeanIX) demonstrated how the combination of SAP Signavio and SAP LeanIX can help unlock value throughout RISE transformations. Specifically, the two products facilitate collaboration between business and IT on what a clean enterprise architecture and efficient business processes should look like, how to get there, and how to ensure that this new state is effectively implemented during rollout. As they summarized in the eXpert eXchange session that followed: SAP Signavio and SAP LeanIX come into play when there is a need for change, and they will stop being used when companies no longer need to change – which will probably never happen.

The day closed with an outlook on the strategic direction of SAP MaxAttention by Kurt Bauer, leading into an open-mic Q&A session, during which Thomas Saueressig took the stage to answer the questions that affect customers the most.

Afterwards, all attendees were invited to a remarkable evening event at the Palazzo in Mannheim, where four members of the SAP Executive Board, Christian Klein (CEO), Thomas Saueressig, Muhammad Alam (SAP Product Engineering), and Gina Vargiu-Breuer (Chief People Officer), gave the SAP MaxAttention community a much-appreciated “maximum attention”.

How to Build a Strong Foundation for Your Business Transformation Journey

The final day of the SAP MaxAttention Summit 2024 started with a keynote from Muhammad Alam on SAP’s end-to-end portfolio strategy. He particularly emphasized the importance of clean and harmonized data for innovation adoption, which in turn paves the way for a successful business transformation. Muhammad was then joined on stage by two customer speakers, Ralf Scherer (Head of SAP Transformation, BMW Group) and Sean Williams (CIO, IBM Corporation), who shared insights from their RISE with SAP journeys. Both agreed on two points: a) speed of transformation is key and b) there is no better safeguarding for cloud migration than SAP MaxAttention.

In the following executive session, Anja Schneider (SVP & Global Head of Premium Engagement & Advisory) and Michael Ameling (EVP & Chief Product Officer SAP Business Technology Platform) demonstrated how premium engagements from SAP and SAP Business Technology Platform support customers’ business AI, data, and clean core strategy. Specifically, Anja promised that dedicated enterprise architects will continue to guide customers through their transformation journeys with a North Star Architecture roadmap, which will also facilitate the achievement of a clean core and therefore an increased business efficiency.

The summit ended with a closing keynote by Rolf Schumann (Co-CEO, Schwarz Digits) and Jonas Andrulis (Founder and CEO, Aleph Alpha GmbH) on the importance of cybersecurity and the new era of generative AI, as well as an event wrap-up by Thomas Saueressig, Kurt Bauer, and Anja Schneider. Kurt gave a preview of the next SAP MaxAttention events in 2024 and thanked all customers who shared their expertise as co-speakers for their great input in keynotes, during customer experience sharing sessions, or in the customer panel that was moderated by Peter Maier (SVP Strategic Customer Engagements).

Many attendees have already let us know how valuable this event was to them, and how much they appreciated the choice of content as well as the opportunity for personal conversations with SAP executives and peers from the SAP MaxAttention community. A particular highlight in this regard were the eXpert eXchange sessions on topics such as SAP Business AI, clean core, enterprise architecture, and RISE with SAP, where an intimate setting in small groups provided a great environment to go deeper into the content and discuss individual requests.

We’re looking forward to continuing the collaboration with our customers along their individual transformation journeys and hope to have more opportunities to meet at SAP Sapphire Orlando or Barcelona and the Regional SAP MaxAttention Expert Forums where we will dive deeper into the hot topics presented at the summit.

We’re delighted to share session recordings and presented slide decks with you to relive the event.

In case of any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out.

entry.title: Expanding Proactive Solutions: Critical Content now Live in SAP for Me
entry.content:
What you already know:

  • What priority solutions is support currently working on that could prevent business impacting issues on your systems (Hot solutions).
  • What solutions, relevant for your systems are other customers viewing most today (Trending solutions).  

 

What is new?

  • Relevant Critical content recommended by our product experts are now directly available for your product within the ‘Get Support’ app in SAP for Me!

As soon as you choose your Product and Product Function when creating a case, you get:

  • Awareness of anything critical for your business
  • Any workarounds or solutions available
  • Ability to subscribe to the critical content to follow for the latest updates

This ensures reduction in effort and time for you to resolve any issues causing severe business impact and ongoing updates providing latest solutions directly to you.

 

Where will you be notified?

  • Navigate to the Services & Support dashboard > ‘Get Support’ app in SAP for Me.

 

  • Fill in the Customer, Description, System, along with the relevant Product & Product Function fields.
  • If a critical solution exists for your Product or Product Function, you will be prompted with a popup outlining the relevant Critical KBA or Note linked with an option to subscribe.
  • It will also appear at the top of the right-hand side list of Recommended Solutions.

 

 

 

What to expect next?

  • We will continue to refine further which customers receive this popup in SAP for Me
  • We will push the notification of critical issues to further locations for customers to consume e.g., Built-In Support within the Product

Please also check out the below blog for more ways to access Proactive Solutions in SAP for Me!

Unlocking Proactive Solutions: Preventative Content now Live in SAP for Me

entry.title: Your Ultimate Guide for SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando
entry.content:
Your Ultimate Guide for SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando:
Mark Your Calendars For These Must-Attend Sessions!

Join us at SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando from June 3rd to June 5th for an unforgettable experience filled with insights, innovations, and invaluable networking opportunities. As you prepare for this event, be sure to prioritize these sessions where you'll gain valuable insights into cutting-edge technologies and strategies that are shaping the future of customer support and business transformation.

Strategy Sessions:

  • SER242: SAP runs SAP: Leading the AI revolution in customer support
    Experience our AI-driven customer support paradigm. Uncover strategies for AI fusion, elevating support efficacy and customer satisfaction. Witness our journey, which sets benchmarks for AI-powered customer service excellence. Using this blueprint to smoothly integrate AI into your company, unlock success through the SAP for Me portal.

  • TRE322: Transform Together: A holistic strategy to execution to bring out your best
    With 70%+ of transformation projects at risk of failure, it takes more than technology to make successful strategy shifts. Accelerate your transformation journey through practices shared by SAP’s COO and CIO on holistic strategy to execution, process excellence, people-centered transformation, and innovation.

Artificial Intelligence Sessions:

  • SER207 + SER248: Translating Generative AI and LLMs into Business Benefits
    Explore how generative AI and large language models (LLMs) are revolutionizing customer support, enabling engineers to provide lightning-fast assistance and enhance internal efficiencies. Elevate your support capabilities and accelerate your customer experience.
  • SER247 + SER202: Reinventing Support with AI
    Discover how intelligent automation and AI are transforming customer support, delivering exceptional value and predictive insights. Step into the future of support and maximize your service experience.
  • SER203: Release the Value of AI in Your Business Transformation
    Witness the transformative power of AI in business processes and learn how SAP Signavio solutions can guide your digital transformation journey. Explore the tangible value AI brings to your business.
  • ASUG307: AI in Customer Support: SAP's Path to Excellence
    Gain insights into SAP's approach to infusing AI into customer support, enhancing efficiency, and elevating user satisfaction. Explore actionable tactics for seamless AI integration and effective measurement of its business outcomes.

SAP Cloud ALM Sessions:

  • SER201: Unlocking Growth: Air Liquide's Success with SAP Cloud ALM
    Discover how SAP Cloud ALM empowers organizations to streamline business processes and drive growth. Learn from Air Liquide Advanced Materials' success story and gain valuable insights into maximizing your cloud journey.
  • SER200: Empowering Your Cloud Journey: Unleashing Transformation with SAP Cloud ALM
    Dive into the transformation management approach with SAP Cloud ALM and explore integration possibilities with SAP Signavio, SAP LeanIX, and SAP Enable Now solutions.
  • SER227: Optimizing Innovation: Road Map for SAP Cloud ALM Solution
    Gain insights into adopting clean core principles and explore the road map for SAP Cloud ALM. Learn how to drive business continuity and streamline operations through efficient integration.
  • SER204: SAP Cloud ALM for Operations at Brightspeed
    Explore the value-driven benefits of SAP Cloud ALM through a case study on Brightspeed's operations. Learn how to leverage SAP Cloud ALM for business process monitoring, integration, and exception monitoring.

Clean Core Sessions:

  • SER253: Enable a Clean Core with SAP Cloud ALM
    Discover SAP's strategy for RISE with SAP Migration and Modernization, focusing on SAP Cloud ALM as a platform for a clean core. Learn how to streamline complexity and preserve operational productivity.
  • SER258: Start Your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Journey Fresh with a Clean Core Strategy
    If you've just signed up for SAP S/4HANA cloud subscription, this session is a must-attend. Explore the benefits of embedded launch activities and gain guidance for a smooth transition to cloud ERP.

Data Transformation Sessions:

  • SER256 + SER206: Migrating to SAP S/4HANA: Confident Data Transition
    Unlock the value in transitioning from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA with the SAP Business Transformation Center solution. Accelerate your journey and take your business forward with confidence.

SAP for Me Sessions:

  • SER205: "SAP for Me": Bundles Unleashed
    Discover the power of bundles in the "SAP for Me" portal and prioritize business-critical tasks. Empower your business with intuitive cloud service management.
  • SER257: SAP for Me: Reporting
    Explore the capabilities of the Customer Insights Dashboard in the SAP for Me reporting application. Customize reports to meet your unique needs and gain a holistic view of your SAP solutions.

Don't miss out on these transformative sessions at SAP Sapphire Orlando 2024! Mark your calendars and prepare to be inspired.

Ensure you connect with our executives and experts at the Services and Support Center. Explore our expert and demo stations, or reserve 1:1 time with our specialists. Contact our reception to secure priority access and elevate your SAP experience with exclusive insights from our leaders and specialists.

See you there!

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop 'Amplifying Business Excellence' (June 27, 2024)
entry.content:
Virtual

June 27, 2024

Agenda

Dear Valued Customers,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on ‘Amplifying Business Excellence through SAP's AI, Data, and Analytics Innovations’ taking place virtually on June 27th, 2024. Please find the current agenda for the workshop here.

Embark on an enlightening journey with our upcoming Innovation workshop, where we will dive into cutting-edge topics such as SAP Generative AI, SAP AI assistant- Joule, and how to integrate AI into existing Data & Analytics portfolio.

Explore the latest innovations in SAP Business Data Fabric and discuss the reference architecture, which could be leveraged or tailored for your organization. On top of these, we will show you one customer example, who has infused AI into their Data and Analytics landscape to maximize the business value.

Our workshop is designed to demonstrate how conversational BI can leverage Generative AI to enhance the analytics process. Additionally, we will guide you through the transition to SAP Datasphere, which constitutes the foundation of the Business Data Fabric on the SAP Business Technology Platform. We will also discuss how to use the complimentary "SAP Expert Evaluation Tool". This tool can evaluate your on-premise BW analytics platform to gauge its readiness for SAP Datasphere.

Join us to gain valuable insights into the strategic use of AI in Data and Analytics context and understand how the Premium Engagements portfolio could help you in your journey to embrace and innovate business data fabric architecture.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

The health and well-being of our customers, employees, and business partners is a top priority for SAP. As a response to the restrictions regarding travel and physical events caused by COVID-19, we offer a virtual event format which allows you to have an interactive, digital experience in a safe environment.

Engage with us - Register for this workshop

In case you want to register for this workshop please reach out to maxattention@sap.com

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Services - Technical and Operational Support for SAP S/4HANA private Cloud
entry.content:
What is SAP Cloud Application Services?

SAP Cloud Application Services (CAS) are technical service subscriptions for SAP private cloud contracts. Designed to supplement existing SAP cloud services, it simplifies the operation of the SAP solution landscape.

Role of SAP Cloud Application Services in Operating SAP Software in the Private Cloud

The technical services aim to enhance the operation and maintenance of SAP software in customers private cloud. With these services, customers get to enjoy the benefit of a smoothly run, constantly updated system, not unlike having a dedicated team ensuring all the gym equipment working flawlessly and effectively. So SAP customers can focus fully on their fitness.

What are the detailed SAP Cloud Application Services Packages?

Depending on the operational needs, SAP offers two types of SAP Cloud Application Services - predefined fixed packages and customer specific tailored packages. Be it everyday administrative tasks or highly specialized support, the respective services cater for all and can be tailored depending specific needs.

The following graphic illustrates CAS packages.

Who Manages SAP Cloud Application Services?

The Client Delivery Manager (CDM)

As customer, you can count on your direct contact, the CDM, for successful service implementation. From observing Service Level Agreement (SLA) standards to timely service progress reports and proactive suggestions, the CDM collaborates closely with your team and SAP CAS resources. CDMs also administrate or request additional services or support the Renewal-Process.

Service Desk

This is the hub for the processing of all SAP CAS tickets that promises service delivery within agreed service hours. The Service Desk seamlessly integrates with SAP's service and support offerings, especially in SAP Enterprise Support, Cloud Edition.

Service Delivery

This is the customer-assigned delivery team which takes charge of managing issues, change requests, service requests, consulting, continuous improvement and monitoring activities with expert understanding of customers SAP landscapes.

See here an illustration for the customer interfaces and working model:

Examples of  SAP Cloud Application Services, Fixed Scope Packages

Release Version Upgrade

Planning an upgrade? Expect comprehensive end-to-end project planning, resource relief, and seamless upgrade management.

Functional Application Management

Benefit from continuous and bespoke SAP solution and business process support based on Service Level Agreements for

  • Incident Management,
  • Problem Management,
  • Change Management und
  • Service Request Management.

Advanced Security and Compliance

This pre-designed Cloud Application Services package aids in managing user master records and roles in accordance with SAP Best Practices – all geared towards improved user and system security.

See here an overview of SAP Cloud Application Services, Fixed Scope Packages.

SAP Cloud Application Services - Custom Tailored Offerings

The diverse portfolio including different services like functional application management, deployment, or data lifecycle management. Much more can be customized to meet your unique needs. See the following graphic for an overview:

What are the Benefits of SAP Cloud Application Services?

SAP Cloud Application Services helps SAP customers in taking care of their infrastructures and solutions. To summarize, they

  • are easy to plan, as they deliver clearly defined services at fixed annual prices.
  • make SAP your partner for infrastructure and solution management based on defined requirements ensuring End-to-End governance.
  • offer a flexible scope of services, delegating technical and functional services to SAP  and changes can easily be done via adaptions.
  • are available globally and can be adapted to regional, language and industry-specific requirements.

Additional information on SAP Cloud Application Services

find more on the sap.com page: SAP Cloud Application Services

(The article originally was created by my colleague Patricia Gantert in german language).

entry.title: Comprehensive Learning Program Available for Composable Storefront
entry.content:
With an effective, multi-functional online platform, businesses can maximize customer engagement, elevate user experience, foster customer retention, and stimulate growth.

Composable storefront is open-source frontend for SAP Commerce Cloud. It allows developers to build innovative, multi-dimensional web applications that are not simply responsive and fast but are also highly customizable to suit the unique requirements of any business.

What's in the Learning Program

 The Learning Program (access required, see below) is designed to fulfill three main objectives:

  1.  Familiarize you with the principles of composable architecture and how they apply to e-commerce storefronts.
  2. Equip you with the skills needed to proficiently use the SAP Commerce Cloud platform for building and managing e-commerce storefronts.
  3. Empower you to design and customize storefronts using the storefront approach.

The software's approach for designing and customizing storefronts aligns well with current market trends, which are rapidly moving towards microservices, API-first, cloud-native, and headless commerce. This approach enables businesses to adopt a composable commerce architecture that is modular, flexible, and can be tailored to evolving business needs and customer preferences.

Who's it for

If you're an application consultant, operations manager, software developer or architect, this learning program is for you. If you have questions around the learning program, or you are interested in similar content, you can visit the SAP Enterprise Support value map for SAP Customer Experience. 

With you in mind, value maps provide structured self-paced learnings to advance your digital skills; access to collaborative forums and SAP experts for personalized guidance; and continuous quality checks to mitigate implementation risks or identify optimization potential.

Where to Access

3 Easy Steps:   

  1. One-time sign-up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required   
  2. Access value maps 
  3. Navigate to the SAP Customer Experience value map 

When you're in the value map, feel free to join our forums, ask questions, or "Request a Call" to speak with one of our experts for more assistance. Value maps are easy to use, but a call with us helps us customize the conversation to your needs and point out relevant content. 

Whether you aim to optimize sales, enhance marketing strategies, or elevate customer service for instance,  harness the power of transformative technology with the value map for SAP Customer Experience solutions. 

Got a question about the value maps, or our content?
Leverage the “ask questions” feature in the value map or contact us:
sapesvaluemaps@sap.com

entry.title: Introducing our New Integration Learning Program for Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
SAP has always been at the forefront of maximizing business outcomes with cloud-based products wrapped up in its impressive Customer Experience solution portfolio. One such offering is SAP Commerce Cloud, an original platform-as-a-service (PaaS) solution targeted towards automating and integrating end-to-end commerce scenarios.

However, the potential for adapting SAP Commerce Cloud to various enterprise needs and third-party solutions makes a critical difference.

From importing up-to-the-minute pricing data, calculating loyalty points for products, notifying users about restocks or executing payments, SAP Commerce Cloud wields extensive scope in its integration capability. Regardless of whether you're synthesizing the solution with other SAP solutions like SAP Customer Data Cloud or SAP S/4HANA, or you wish to extend it to a variety of common situations - the possibilities are vast.

Yet, the goal here is have a friendly way of extending and integrating your solution.

When it comes to determining strategies for integrating SAP Commerce Cloud, the aim is to evaluate the appropriate options fitting company needs. The decisions should be strategic and productive, tailoring the incredible capabilities of this solution to the needs of your organization and its scale.

 The goal is to move away from "classic", tightly coupled in-app extensions of SAP Commerce and move towards a decoupled, cloud-friendly way of extending and integrating your SAP Commerce Cloud solution. This course will use some of the key aspects covered to guide you in your decision on which integration options might be best

Let's check what can you find in our reinvented integration Learning Program for guiding you in your integration scenarios.

Through this learning program you will get information about extending and integrating your SAP Commerce Cloud solution along with other SAP products, such as SAP S/4HANA, along with third-party solutions and also some guidelines to choose the ideal integration strategy for various scenarios. 

What you can find is

  • Learn about SAP Customer Experience solutions Integration and Extension Options
  •  Introduction to SAP Commerce Integrations 
  • How to integrate and Extend SAP Commerce Cloud Solution
  • Common Integration Scenarios for SAP Commerce Cloud
  •  Integration essentials for Intelligent Selling Services

 The transformation brought by SAP Commerce Cloud is not limited to mere operational tweaks but serves to redefine how businesses perceive and evolve their commercial endeavors. SAP Commerce Cloud ceaselessly works towards a unified and more accessible commerce landscape, driving more value in the customer journey and turning potential into reality.

Sign up for the SAP Enterprise Support value maps by requesting access to SAP Learning Hub or join the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps Learning Room if you already have access.

Any questions? Please, contact the Value map team! 

Mónica Domingo

Global Topic Owner - SAP Customer Experience Solutions

entry.title: Start your SAP Signavio Process Insights adoption with the redesigned Starter e-learnings
entry.content:
Play the embedded video

Hello SAP Signavio community,

as mentioned in the video above, SAP Signavio Value Map team is excited to announce that we have redesigned all our Process Insights sessions from the SAP Signavio Adoption Starter series.

If you haven't yet signed up for the SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps, don't worry, we've got you covered! Get started with SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps here. (Check out our step-by-step instructional video▶️ on how to join SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value maps.)

Direct link to the refreshed E-Learning sessions:

SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for IT experts
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Lead to Cash (Sales)
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Finance
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Source to Pay (Procurement)
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Acquire to Decommission (Plant Maintenance)
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Plan to Fulfil (Manufacturing)

We will also continue with the live sessions (see the following blog post). The new schedule will be available in the next 2 weeks.

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "SAP Signavio | Business Process Transformation" topic).

Happy learning!

entry.title: Understand and Explore your SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition with our new E-Learning
entry.content:
Hello SAP Signavio Community, 

Do you need help reading and understanding your Process Insights Discovery Edition Report?  Not sure where to start?  If so, this E-Learning is for you!

In this E-Learning you will learn how to: 

  • Leverage SAP Signavio Process Insights for your organization
  • Identify process optimization potential for your company
  • Obtain recommendations to transform your processes

The SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition provides tailor-made recommendations, based on data extracted from your SAP ERP  (or SAP S/4 HANA) System, to help you:

  • Improve business processes
  • Start the journey to SAP S/4 HANA
  • Optimize live SAP S/4 HANA systems

“Understanding and Exploring your SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition” E-Learning

Requirement: Registration for the SAP Learning Hub is required in order to utilize e-Learning sessions.  If you are not currently registered, please do so here: SAP Enterprise Support Academy

For additional information please refer to the following Blog Posts:

  • Request your own SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition for free!
  • How the SAP Signavio Process Insights, discover edition can help in your role.

Recommendation: If you are not yet signed up for Value Maps, please join via this link.

You will discover new opportunities to understand and analyze the bottlenecks in business processes, and improve the identified challenges. The Business Process Transformation value map helps you to innovate your business processes in an ever-changing world.

Please don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "SAP Signavio | Business Process Transformation" topic).

entry.title: AI Adoption und Transformation – von Technik zur erfolgreichen Nutzung, Anpassung und Veränderung
entry.content:
Wir erleben aktuell besondere Zeiten der mehrfachen Disruption. So wird künstliche Intelligenz fundamental nicht nur Technologie, sondern auch die Arbeit wandeln. Wie gut uns dabei die Transformation gelingt, hängt auch von unseren Vorgehensweisen bei der Adoption, Adaption und Transformation ab. Worüber sprechen wir da aber eigentlich? Laut Wikipedia bedeutet Adoption:

„In computing, adoption means the transfer (conversion) between an old system and a target system in an organization (or more broadly, by anyone). If a company works with an old software system, it may want to use a new system which is more efficient, has more work capacity, etc. So then a new system needs to be adopted, after which it can be used by users.“

Sieht man es ganzheitlicher, geht es über die eher ‚technische‘  Einführung von Software hinaus, um eine möglichst umfassende Akzeptanz und Produktivität von Nutzern und Nutzerinnen hinsichtlich digitaler Werkzeuge zu erzielen. Wie immer kommt es dabei eigentlich auf die diversen Perspektiven der Stakeholder an:

  • das Management will ROI, Kostensparung, Wachstum, Produktivität
  • die IT möchte niedrige Integrationskosten bei hoher Sicherheit,
  • Fachbereiche wünschen sich fachliche Ziele und
  • die eigentlichen NutzerInnen wünschen sich wenig Frustration und, dass ihre Arbeit einfacher, schneller oder besser wird.

Das sind alles Wünsche oder Projektionen, die es jenseits der rein technologischen Perspektive zu berücksichtigen gilt, besonders auch für Anwendungen generativer künstlicher Intelligenz. Gerade hier sind jedoch die Akzeptanz sowie produktive Nutzung zentral. Denn bei der Einführung und Nutzung von KI schwingen viele Ängste mit – sie erstrecken sich von Dystopien wie der Auslöschung der Welt über Unsicherheit bis hin zur Angst vor einem individuellen Job- und Relevanzverlust. Daher soll hier Adoption auch erweitert als Reifungsprozess über die technische Nutzung oder Prozessoptimierung hinaus verstanden und auch aus ‚menschlicher Perspektive‘ analysiert werden.

Die Digitale Adoption als Entwicklungsprozess

Ich habe dafür im Rahmen der Digital Adoption Blogging Challenge in Anlehnung an Maslow schon unterschieden zwischen klassischer Adoption als Nutzung bis hin zur begeisterten Nutzung. 

In dem genannten Beitrag wurde beschrieben, dass wir vor allem mit den obersten Stufen das engere Verständnis von Adoption nicht nur ‚affektiv‘ erweitern, sondern vor allem auch beim Grad der Reifung in Richtung Adaption und Transformation, denn am Ende wollen wir jetzt auch bei der Künstlichen Intelligenz mehr erreichen als nur eine leidenschaftslose Nutzung von Tools. Im Idealfall wird eine technologische Chance umfassend in die eigene Wertschöpfung integriert bis hin zur begeisterten Transformation von Wertschöpfung – d.h. Prozesse, Geschäftsmodelle, Rollen bis Aufgaben neu denken.

Die KI-Transformation braucht die erweiterte digital Adoption

Auf Basis dieser generellen Reflektionen zur Adoption, Adaption und Transformation wollen wir nun die KI-Transformation und KI-Adoption beleuchten.  Wesentlichen Erfolgsbausteine sind jenseits der rein technologischen Fragen wie üblich Kommunikation, Einbindung, klare Ziele, Leitplanken, Lernangebote, Verstehen der Widerstände, Motivationen, Interessen und andere Ansätze – also Bausteine die man generell aus dem Change Management kennt. Sie sind essenziell, um Ängsten oder Widerständen, wie sie aktuell im Kontext KI entstehen, zu begegnen.

Welche Vorgehensweisen und Modelle können helfen?

Im Folgenden versuche ich etablierte Modelle neu zu kontextualisieren für die jetzt anstehende KI-Transformation. Natürlich sind auch andere Klassiker auch im neuen Kontext hilfreich. Hier seien beispielhaft einige vorgestellt:

Im Folgenden versuche ich etablierte Modelle neu zu kontextualisieren für die jetzt anstehende KI-Transformation. Natürlich sind auch andere Klassiker im neuen Kontext hilfreich. Hier seien beispielhaft einige vorgestellt:

Ein vereinfachtes Modell ist das des Sollen, Können, Dürfen und Wollen:

  • ‚Sollen‘: Gemeint sind eine klare KI-Strategie und ein Ziel, wie man einen Erfolg genau definieren würde. Bei KI ist wichtig, unter den vielen Use Cases diejenigen zu identifizieren, die derzeit technisch umsetzbar sind, akzeptiert sind und den höchsten Mehrwert bringen.
  • ‚Können‘ bedeutet: Die jeweiligen KI-Kompetenzen haben alle – oder können sie je nach Zielgruppe entwickeln.
  • ‚Dürfen‘ heißt, dass die entsprechenden Befugnisse und Freiräume vorhanden sind um z.B. KI-Tools wie Co-Piloten, Agenten oder Chatbots zu nutzen.
  • ‚Wollen‘ bedeutet, dass Überzeugung und Akzeptanz zur Nutzung von KI vorherrschen.

Das Diffusionsmodell von Everett Rogers beschreibt, wie Innovationen in einer Organisation aufgenommen und verbreitet werden. Es identifiziert fünf Typen von Menschen (Innovatoren, frühe Adopter, frühe Mehrheit, späte Mehrheit, Nachzügler) und deren unterschiedliche Bereitschaft zur Technologieannahme. Für die Nutzung und Akzeptanz von generativer Künstlicher Intelligenz im Unternehmen weist es auf die Notwendigkeit hin, die Mitarbeitende über die Technologie zu informieren, zu schulen und fortlaufende Unterstützung anzubieten. Dazu passt das nächste Modell.

Crossing the Chasm von Geoffrey Moore befasst sich mit der Herausforderung, eine innovative Technologie von einer kleinen Gruppe früher Adopter zu einer breiten Mehrheit zu vermitteln. Es empfiehlt, sich auf eine spezifische Zielgruppe zu konzentrieren und sicherzustellen, dass die Technologie an sich ändernde Kundenerwartungen angepasst werden kann. Für generative KI bedeutet dies, dass verschiedene Zielgruppen unterschiedlich behandelt werden sollten. So kann man die Early Adopter und Innovatoren als Pilot-Teilnehmer oder als Promotoren nutzen, z.B. für Change Agent Netzwerke oder Coaches.

Die disruptive Innovation von Clayton M. Christensen zeigt, wie neue Technologien alte Prozesse ersetzen, indem sie einfacher und kostengünstiger sind. Die Aktzeptanz von KI im Unternehmen kann dadurch erhöht werden, indem man eine Kultur des Experimentierens und Lernens fördert und KI  aktiv in jedem Team einführt, um bestehende Aufgaben und Prozesse zu optimieren oder sogar zu ersetzen.

Das Technologieakzeptanz-modell (TAM) erklärt, wie BenutzerInnen eine neue Technologie annehmen und verwenden, basierend auf ihrer wahrgenommenen Nützlichkeit und Benutzerfreundlichkeit. Es unterstreicht die Notwendigkeit, bei der Einführung von generativer KI im Unternehmen deutlich zu machen, wie sie die Arbeit effizienter macht und wie einfach sie zu bedienen ist. Das TAM ist das wohl am besten empirisch untersuchte und erweiterte Modell - so wurden auch weitere beeinflussende Variablen ausdifferenziert wie sozialer Einfluss (Subjektive Norm, Image und Freiwilligkeit) und kognitive Prozesse (Sozialer Einfluss, kognitiv-instrumentelle Prozessvariablen). Neuer Untersuchungen stellen zunehmend das Vertrauen der NutzerInnen in die Technologie als akzeptanzfördernd hervor – gerade bei KI ein zentraler Punkt.

Das ADKAR-Modell ist ein weiteres bekanntes Framework für Change-Management. Es zeigt, wie Individuen erfolgreich Veränderungen durchlaufen können, und kann zur Förderung der Akzeptanz von KI im Unternehmen angewendet werden. Dabei geht es um Awareness (Bewusstsein schaffen), Desire (den Wunsch der Veränderung schaffen), Knowledge (Wissen vermitteln), Ability (Fähigkeiten ausbauen) und Reinforcement (Verstärkung). Es gilt dabei, keines der Elemente zu vergessen bei der Einführung von KI und zeigt, dass Awareness nicht gleich Knowledge oder Ability ist und die Verstetigung durch Verstärkung und kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung wichtig ist.

Kotters Modell für Leading Change besteht aus acht Schritten zur Schaffung erfolgreicher Veränderungen. Es kann die Akzeptanz von generativer KI fördern, indem es eine strategische Vision und ein Narrativ für die Nutzung der KI und ihrer Vorteile erstellt und kommuniziert, Koalitionen schmiedet, Hindernisse beseitigt und Quick-Wins erreicht.

Die Veränderungskurve nach Kübler-Ross beschreibt die emotionalen Phasen, die Menschen bei Veränderungen erleben. Sie kann bei der Implementierung von generativer KI helfen, indem sie die unterschiedlichen emotionalen Reaktionen der Mitarbeitenden berücksichtigt, um danach Kommunikation und Unterstützung anzupassen. Die Phasen variieren und sind u.a. Vorahnung, Schock, Ablehnung, Verzweiflung im Tal der Tränen, Lernen und Anpassung, Akzeptanz und Integration. Betroffene durchlaufen diese Phasen in unterschiedlicher Geschwindigkeit oder je nach Kontext ganz anders. Es zeigt, dass Emotionen wie Angst, Furcht, Begeisterung, Neid immer bei Veränderungen mitspielen und je nach Stakeholder zu prüfen und zu behandeln sind.  

SAP Activate ist eine Methodik zur Implementierung von SAP-Lösungen, in die KI zunehmend eingebettet ist. Es bietet viele Templates und Tools, um SAP-Projekte zu erleichtern. Dabei gibt es u.a. den Workstream ‚Solution Adoption‘, der auf die Bedürfnisse von Change Management als Cross-Topic und Weiterbildung eingeht.

Bei allen Frameworks und Modellen ist es natürlich wichtig, empathisch und intuitiv auch auf die jeweiligen Interessen, Emotionen und Kultur zu reagieren - je danach was eben im Kontext Sinn macht. Auch hilft der Kontext und die Zeit in der Ansätze entstanden sind zur Einordnung und Reflektion. Ein erster Blick auf die englische Change Management Seite von Wikipedia ist dazu schonmals interessant. Die Frameworks sind wie Werkzeugkisten – gut ist, wenn man sie kennt und versteht. Aber im Zweifel eben nicht oder anders benutzt.

Im Folgenden der Versuch einer Zusammenfassung wichtiger Bausteine, speziell für den Bereich der AI-Adoption. 

Bausteine einer erfolgreichen humanzentrierten AI Adoption

In der nachfolgenden Abbildung findet man angedeutet vier wesentliche Bausteine einer humanzentrierten KI/AI-Adoption jenseits der rein technischen Betrachtung mit einigen wichtigen Stichpunkten dazu inkl. Links für den SAP-Bereich. Auch wenn hier eine gewisse Chronologie wahrscheinlich ist, stehen diese 4 Bausteine hier doch gleichberechtigt ‚nebeneinander‘. Diese wurden auch in der Blogging Challenge zu Digital Adoption im SAP Kontext bestätigt. 

Human Centered Design Mindset & Praxis

Hier sind etablierte Ansätze des agilen humanzentrierten Designs von neuen Lösungen eine wesentliche Basis für den gewünschten Adoption/Adaptions-/Transformationserfolg. Für die Auswahl der geeigneten KI-Szenarien hilft dabei zum Beispiel das SAP Apphaus Toolkit für generative AI – der generative AI Exploration Workshops. Ob Design Thinking, Co-Creation, Experimentieren, agiles Coaching oder andere Ansätze – wichtig ist immer den Nutzer in den Mittelpunkt zu stellen und von ihm und ihr aus zu denken. 

Organizational Change Management

Jenseits der individuellen Perspektive bedeutet eine AI-Adoption Stufen immer auch den Einsatz von Change Management. Dabei ist u.a. Folgendes wichtig:

Klarheit und Nutzen: Vorteile der neuen Technologie müssen klar kommuniziert werden je nach Rolle oder Persona. Mitarbeitende sollten verstehen, wie die Technologie ihre Arbeit effizienter/besser macht.

Vertrauen und einfache Bedienbarkeit hilft zur Akzeptanz: Das humanzentrierte Design vom Nutzer aus, ein einfacher Zugang und die Benutzerfreundlichkeit der Technologie sind von entscheidender Bedeutung. Das Vertrauen in die Tools wird dabei zunehmend wichtig. Besonders bei KI sind vertrauensfördernde Maßnahmen wie Transparenz der Modelle, oder Prüfung von möglichem Bias wichtig.

SAP bietet hier kostenfreie Tools und Lernangebote, Communities zum Austausch sowie Organizational Change Management Services an wie den datengestützten Deep Transformation Insights Service.  

Learning and Enablement – auch KI Upskilling genannt

Die wichtigsten KI-Investitionen sind derzeit neben Automatisierung zur Erzielung von höherer Produktivität und Kosten-Effizienz die Umschulung oder das Upskilling.

Neben Grundlagen geht es dabei immer um den Einsatz von generativer KI im jeweiligen Arbeitsalltag und Job. Für die Grundlagen bieten sich E-Learning-Angebote an. Einige Inhalte sind auch kostenfrei, zum Beispiel über das HPI oder den KI-Campus. Für wichtige Zielgruppen wie Software-Entwicklung, F&E oder IT werden oft auch spezielle firmeninterne Akademien aufgebaut.

Da das Ziel des Upskilling immer Handlungskompetenz und die konkrete Umsetzung ist, sollte KI Training über Grundlagen hinaus gehen, Üben, Ausprobieren, Reflektieren beinhalten und im Austausch mit anderen stattfinden. Mögliche Methoden sind dabei Workshops oder Hackathons, in denen an relevanten Herausforderungen gearbeitet wird. Im LernOS Framework gibt es zudem einen KI-Leitfaden. Dieser Leitfaden strukturiert eine selbstgesteuerte Lernreise von Kleingruppen mit Input und Übungen rund um KI. Damit kann das Lernen am Arbeitsplatz und der Austausch einfach und relativ kostenneutral realisiert werden.   
SAP-KI-Produkte kann man über SAP Learning Hub oder SAP Schulungen lernen. Derzeit gibt es bereits 59 kostenfreie Lerninhalte zu „Artificial Intelligence“.

Exkurs: Einsatz von KI im SAP Produkt Training

Ein weiteres Einsatzfeld ist das Training in SAP Produkten und Technologien. Jedes Jahr lernen Millionen von SAP Kunden, Mitarbeiter oder Partner neue Skills.

Dabei kann unterschieden werden zwischen

  • KI Dienste für Autoren: Diese können textbasiert sein wie zur Erstellung von Quizzes & Assessment Fragen, Skripting oder Übersetzung. Weitere Möglichkeiten sind Mediendienste rund um die Erstellung von Audio, Videos und Bildmaterial. So wurde in diesem Online-Kurs zum Beispiel Zusammenfassungen via ChatGPT und das Video mit Text to Video via Synthesia erstellt. 
  • KI Dienste für Lernende: Hier geht es um Knowledge Discovery, was KI optimiertes Suchen und Finden bedeutet, Empfehlungen, bis hin zum digitalen Lernberater.

Weitere Themen wie die weitere Digitalisierung von Lern-Services sind vorstellbar. Erste Piloten zeigen, dass es dabei nicht ein einzelnes Tool gibt, sondern eine hybride, sich stetig erweiternde Landschaft. Gerade wenn es um neues Wissen geht wie im Produkt-Training, das noch kein KI Sprachmodell kennen kann, ist die Stärke von KI die Unterstützung und Augmentierung von Experten in der Lernmittel-Produktion. Dabei können strukturierte Metadaten und Grounding-Techniken helfen, damit die KI weniger halluziniert.

Ein weiteres Beispiel ist der Einsatz von KI für SAP Endnutzer: So können Lerninhalte und Dokumentation für SAP Produkte per Click im SAP Enable Now Werkzeug automatisiert übersetzt werden und entweder in der Software selbst über einen sogenannten Companion abgerufen werden, oder über zentrale Wissensdatenbanken. Weitere Möglichkeiten generativer KI sind in Planung – wobei die Grenzen zwischen Lernen und Software-Nutzung zunehmend verschwimmen – die KI ist dann Performance Support.

Technical Support & Consulting

Neben dem technischen ‚low‘ und ‚high touch‘ Support bei der Einführung kommt der laufenden Beratung eine Schlüsselrolle zu, auch über den klassischen Projekt-Lebenszyklus hinaus. Da KI bei SAP-Produkten eingebettet ist von HCM bis SCM oder BTP bietet sich Unterstützung in der Cloud als Support Abo mit SAP Preferred Success an oder in der private Cloud mit SAP Cloud Application Services.

Um Vertrauen zu fördern und Missbrauch zu vermeiden, sollte die Nutzung von KI im Unternehmen immer entlang ethischer Grundsätze und Leitlinien laufen – die konkret operationalisiert werden müssen. Dabei sollte man dann beispielsweise bestimmen,

  • welche Use-Cases genauer geprüft werden müssen, z. B. bei der Verwendung von persönlichen Daten oder im Hinblick auf mögliche Bias,
  • welche Use-Cases ein No-Go sind, z. B. Überwachung oder Beeinflussung von Verhalten. 

Zum technischen Support gehören auch Werkzeuge wie Digitale Adoption Plattformen (wie SAP Enable Now oder Walkme), Plattformen für Prozessmanagement & Analyse, zur Zusammenarbeit und Kommunikation (Wikis, Foren etc.) sowie Tools zur Befragung und zum entsprechenden Reporting. 

Resüme & Aufruf

Dieser Beitrag kann das Thema der Adoption von KI/AI nur anreißen. Es wird hoffentlich die Diskussion motivieren, warum und wie wir über die rein technische Einführung hinaus den Erfolg dieser wichtigen Veränderung in unserer Zeit sicherstellen können.

Früher oder später werden die meisten Wissensarbeiter KI Tools für mehr Produktivität oder Kreativität nutzen. Ob spezielle Tools oder die sogenannten Co-Piloten, die in bestehenden Softwares wie Microsoft Office eingebunden sind. Es wird also Aufgaben, Rollen, Prozesse und Jobs verändern. Damit wird es auch das Design bzw. Re-Design von Organisationen beeinflussen. Neben den üblichen Kriterien wie Erwünschtheit, Machbarkeit und Rentabilität sind sinnvolle Kriterien auch, wie digitalisierbar, automatisierbar und kostenintensiv Aufgaben sind.

Meine eigene AI-Adoption

Ich versuche immer bei Innovationen die eigene Adoption selbst auszuprobieren. So nutze ich KI für:

  • Voice-to-Text-Transkription und Zusammenfassung unseres EducationNewscast Podcast
  • Zusammenfassung von Texten
  • Recherche & Brainstorming beim Einarbeiten in neue Themen im Dialog mit ChatGPT
  • Vorschläge für neue Texte zum Beispiel für Blogartikel, Mails-Titel/ Betreff-Zeilen
  • Erstellung von Grafiken für Präsentationen
  • Übersetzung von jeglichen Texten und Formaten

Neben dem allgemeinen Verständnis und Kenntnis verschiedener Tools ist dabei die Kompetenz des Prompt Engineerings hilfreich, Austausch mit Gleichgesinnten und Teilen von Good-Practices & Templates. Zudem ist es hilfreich, erweiterte Techniken des Prompt-Engineering wie zum Beispiel Chaining oder Multi-prompting zu erlernen. Die menschliche Sprache ersetzt zwar Programmiersprache, jedoch gibt es dazu Methoden und Good Practices die im Sinne einer Chatbot-Kompetenz helfen. 

Durch die dynamische Entwicklung im Feld der KI wird Adoption, Akzeptanz, Upskilling und mehr wie beschrieben für WissensarbeiterInnen über 2024 hinaus relevant sein.

Weiter zu erörtern sind regulative, technische und ethische Fragen, die das Thema Adoption auf eine gesellschaftliche Ebene heben.

Es zeigt zudem, dass wir in einem Relaunch unserer früheren Blogparade noch einmal einige Beiträge speziell dem Thema KI-Adoption widmen sollten. Wer Interesse hat, meldet sich gerne!

Ohne den Fokus auf den Menschen werden KI-Einführungen nicht nur weniger erfolgreich sein – sie können sogar schädlich sein. Lasst uns das verhindern und an einer humanzentrierten Nutzung von KI gemeinsam arbeiten.

Literatur

Unser Podcasts zum Thema KI in der Weiterbildung https://podcast.opensap.info/educationnewscast/

Newsletter rund um generative KI in der Bildung von MIT Professor E. Mollick 

IBM AI Adoption Index 

Jenewein, T. (2024): Digital Adoption und Adaption: Unternehmen erfolgreich digitalisieren – SAPNewsCenter.

Blog: Warum Digital Adoption für den Erfolg von SAP-Projekten so wichtig ist (und wie sie gelingt) 

Kurs: AI Ethik bei SAP: https://open.sap.com/courses/aie1-1

LernOS Leitfaden für KI https://cogneon.github.io/lernos-ai/de/ 

Harvard Business Review (2023). Reskilling in the Age of AI 

Where Should Your Company Start with GenAI? (HBR, 2023)

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention IWS 'Sparking Business Revolution through AI' (Virtual, 25 de Julio de 2024)
entry.content:
Virtual 

25 de Julio de 2024

Agenda

Estimado cliente,

Tenemos el placer de invitarle al Taller de Innovación SAP MaxAttention centrado en 'Sparking Business Revolution through Artificial Intelligence' que tendrá lugar virtualmente el 25 de julio de 2024. Aquí encontrará el programa actual del taller.

En un entorno en el que la inteligencia artificial está revolucionando el panorama empresarial, SAP le invita a un evento especial para descubrir cómo nuestras soluciones de IA pueden transformar su organización. Este evento contará con expertos de SAP Premium Hub CoE LAC, que compartirán estrategias y casos prácticos de uso de inteligencia artificial aplicados a diversos sectores.

Únase a los expertos de SAP Premium Engagement para conocer las capacidades de la suite SAP Business AI y cómo puede ayudarle en el camino hacia la excelencia y la revolución empresarial, con el respaldo de SAP MaxAttention.

Si desea inscribirse en este taller, póngase en contacto con maxattention@sap.com

Nuestros talleres

Estas sesiones y series de talleres se centran en un tema específico y su objetivo es permitir a nuestros clientes comprender la cartera de productos y las tecnologías innovadoras de SAP para impulsar su adopción y consumo. En concreto, ahora es más importante que nunca ayudar a las empresas a tener éxito y a responder a los mercados cambiantes transformándose en empresas inteligentes en la economía de la experiencia.

Sus comentarios

No dude en compartir sus comentarios y opiniones en la sección de comentarios que aparece a continuación.

entry.title: Interact with SAP anywhere, anytime with SAP for Me Mobile App
entry.content:
What is SAP for Me Mobile App? 

With the SAP for Me Mobile App you can easily interact with SAP from anywhere and at anytime. You'll have complete transparency into your SAP products all in one place. The app's focus is to streamline and simplify everyday tasks, making it ideal for handling straightforward processes and providing you with a simplified experience.  

These are the key features of the app: 

  • Receive mobile notifications. 
  • Find SAP Notes and SAP Knowledge Base Articles. 
  • Report a case. 
  • Manage your cases.
  • Monitor cloud service status. 
  • Monitor the status of your service requests. 
  • See SAP-relevant events. 
  • See recommended content from openSAP. 

Today, we will highlight the most prominent benefits of using SAP for Me Mobile App. The numbers displayed on the home page screenshot correspond to the descriptions of the features listed.

1. Notifications: When notifications are enabled, in SAP for Me Mobile App, you can see notifications for the following:
Case: Status changes for your reported cases.
Cloud system: Availability status changes for your cloud systems.
SAP Community: Updates from the SAP Community.
2. Search the SAP Knowledge Base: Find SAP Notes and SAP Knowledge Base Articles that answer common support queries.
3. Get Support: Use the step-by-step guided Get Support application to report the problem.
4. Manage Cases: From Case List you can access individual Case to manage it: review replies from SAP which may include solutions, reply to a case by adding text or attachments, send the case back to SAP, and close the case.
5. Cloud Systems Availability Information: Get an overview of Cloud System status.
6. Upcoming Events: View the latest information on SAP events related to your products. 
7. User Action Menu and Feedback: Access your profile and settings. Here you can also provide feedback for the Mobile App.

 

 

 

Not Listed: Service Requests and Recommendations.

Do you think you can benefit from using SAP for Me Mobile App? Download and start using it today!

 

 

 

 

 

 

For more information on how to use the SAP for Me Mobile App, refer to Online Help

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors HCM: Continuous Quality Checks
entry.content:
The SAP Enterprise Support portfolio of assets, services and tools can help you transform, adopt, integrate and extend your SAP SuccessFactors solutions. You have available a range of deliverables including empowerment assets, expert guidance and collaboration, innovation and value realization services and tools, and the mission critical support digital experience.

With regards to SAP SuccessFactors, one of the key assets I would like to highlight are the Continuous Quality Check services (or CQC services for short).

In general, continuous quality check and improvement services from SAP connect you with an SAP Expert. This person will analyze your system and/or situation based on real life data from your systems or solution. After each service, you receive a service report with an executive summary, findings and a detailed action plan to mitigate risks or improve your situation.

For SAP SuccessFactors we have the following:

CQC for deployment readiness for SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite
This service is designed to provide a key settings review before the go-live. During this remote service, an analysis of the SAP SuccessFactors tenant is performed and recommendations for optimal configuration are given in alignment with SAP best practices.

Service can be used:

  • Before the go-live of a new SAP SuccessFactors implementation.
  • When additional modules are added to the existing SAP SuccessFactors solution
  • As a “health check” for productive SAP SuccessFactors systems.

Service cannot be used:

  • If you have issues with specific business processes
  • if you require a design review or if you require consulting expertise.

Please check the service infosheet in SAP Support Portal to learn about the scope, key features and benefits of this service, when to use it or not and further details of the delivery.

CQC Going Live Support
The continuous quality check (CQC) for going-live support service for SAP SuccessFactors performs a complete monitoring of your BizX tenant during the go-live and provides an analysis of the key performance indicators. The aim of this service is to:

  • Safeguard the SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite go-live.
  • Minimize potential risks of critical go-lives.
  • Provide high-level support in case of unforeseen incidents during go-live.

Please check the service infosheet in SAP Support Portal to learn about the scope, key features and benefits of this service, when to use it or not and further details of the delivery.

CQC for interface management for SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite

The continuous quality check (CQC) for interface management focuses on the evaluation of potential risks of key interfaces between SAP S/4HANA and cloud components within key processes of the Intelligent Enterprise.

This service is available for solutions that are either in production or close to production start-up. It is most applicable if you have interfaces with known or suspected problems in meeting requirements such as:

  • Stability and a high throughput with an optimal interface configuration
  • Rapid response time for a good performance

Please check the service infosheet in SAP Support Portal to learn about the scope, key features and benefits of this service, when to use it or not and further details of the delivery.

CQC for deployment readiness for SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management

This service is designed to provide a key settings review before the go-live. During this remote service, an analysis of the SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management tenant is performed and recommendations for optimal configuration are given in alignment with SAP best practices.

Service can be used:

  • Before the go-live of a new SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management implementation.
  • Implementation of additional SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management functionality or additional go-live phases
  • As a “health check” for productive SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management systems.

Service cannot be used:

  • If you have issues with specific business processes
  • if you require a design review or if you require consulting expertise.

Please check the service infosheet in SAP Support Portal to learn about the scope, key features and benefits of this service, when to use it or not and further details of the delivery.

Requesting these remote services

Remote Services can be requested via the Get Support application in SAP for Me (SAP Note 1296527). When submitting your request, please select:

  • Product: “Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services”
  • Product function: “Service request for a Cloud Solution”

If you need assistance in submitting your case, you may contact your local Customer Interaction Center (CIC).

Please note the priority of these cases cannot be high or very high. This product and product function do not accept these priorities.

Further Support and Empowerment via SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Value Maps are a support and empowerment program from SAP Enterprise Support and are available to you via the SAP Learning Hub. A one-time sign in with your S User is required, and everything thereafter is free as part of your entitlements. We provide:

  • Prescriptive Guidance
  • Empowerment
  • Social Collaboration
  • Expert Access

Check out the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page  for more and start engaging today!

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention IWS 'Journey to Clean Core with SAP MaxAttention and RISE with SAP' (July 16, 2024)
entry.content:
Virtual

July 16, 2024

Agenda

Dear Valued Customers,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on ‘Journey to Clean Core with SAP MaxAttention and RISE with SAP’ taking place virtually on July 16, 2024. Please find the agenda here.

Clean Core is a system that is close to standard as possible, while running cloud-compliant extensions and integrations. It allows you to adapt your system to changing business requirement and to adopt new capabilities. Clean Core reduces technical debt and decreases system complexity. Major benefits include accelerated SAP S/4HANA cloud upgrade cycles, shortened project times and lower costs. Leverage the innovative capabilities of SAP Business Technology platform. Only a Clean Core enables you to use the innovations which SAP delivers with each release, including AI. This SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop is designed to help you understand different Extensibility methods and integrations of Clean Core, and how to use it, also learn Clean Core journey with SAP MaxAttention.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Improved ‘Get Support’ Experience: Enhanced Placement of Detailed Description & AI Recommendations
entry.content:
In our continuous effort to enhance the SAP for Me ‘Get Support’ user experience, we’re introducing a change that’ll streamline the information flow and provide more accurate recommendations.

We’ll discuss the details of this change, the trial period, how you can provide feedback, and what to expect next.

What is new?

The ‘Detailed Description’ field was moved up directly under the ‘Short Description’ field.

The primary motivation behind this change is to leverage the power of AI to provide users with more accurate information. Our AI service can analyze the additional information provided in the 'Detailed Description' and offer more relevant solutions, which are now placed at the bottom instead of the right-hand side.

Time Period for the Change

We understand that any change takes time to adjust to, which is why we are implementing this as a trial version. The trial period will last approximately 30 days, during which we’ll closely monitor user feedback and evaluate the impact of the change. This will allow us to make any necessary adjustments before implementing the change permanently.

*Please note that the trial version is limited to a specific group of users. We do not offer the option to opt-in or opt-out. We appreciate your understanding and participation in this trial as we strive to enhance our product. Thank you for your cooperation during this trial period.

 

Where to share feedback?

Your feedback is crucial in helping us improve our services. To provide feedback on this change, please use the 'Feedback Slider' on the right-hand side. Simply click on the slider and share your thoughts, suggestions, or any issues you may have encountered. We highly value your input and will carefully consider all feedback received.

What to expect ?

Following the successful launch of the trial version, we’ll focus on refining the ‘Get Support’ application. We value your feedback in identifying areas for improvement that can be leveraged to further enhance the user experience. Stay tuned for updates on our progress and the next release of the ‘Get Support’ application.
